---
name: Bug report
about: Something isn't working
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the bug

A clear description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Start app with `./start.sh`
2. ...
3. See error

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened. Include error messages or log output.

## Logs

Paste relevant log output (sanitize any API keys):

```
# logs/app.jsonl or logs/transcriber.log
```

## Environment

- OS: [e.g. macOS 14.5]
- Node.js version: [e.g. 20.x]
- Python version: [e.g. 3.11]
- Electron version: [from package.json]
- AI provider in use: [OpenAI / Groq / Gemini / Anthropic / Ollama]
- STT model: [e.g. small, base]

## Additional context

Any other context — screenshots, config (no API keys), etc.
